children.text: How do I add family members in my account?

1. Click on the plus symbol (+) and select the best way for you to send the invitation. (Whatsapp, SMS, E-mail, etc..)

            2. On the invited mobile, install the app from the invitation link received.

            3. When your family member open the app for the first time, he should be automatically joined into the account. If this doesn't occur, select the option "I have a family code" and insert the information presented in the invitation.

            4. After theses steps, you are going to receive a request to approve your family member. Select "Yes" to approve.
How do I turn off calls and SMS notifications from my family members?
It is easy. Just select the option "Settings" in the sidebar menu and turn off the items you desire.
How do I track my family in Real-Time?

Open the map entirely clicking on the Location History located at the bar below the map.

			2. Select your family member and choose the option "Real-Time".
Can I track a person without their permission?

No. ZoeMob is a service that requires permission and consent from your users. It can only be activated in mobiles which the subscriber has legal authority, formal or consensus for this action. The owner must have knowledge and must agree with all terms of usage and the privacy policy. Our company isn\u2019t responsible for the consequences and doesn\u2019t offer support for users that don't use the app properly.
How do I remove a family member?

1. Touch on the member you wanna remove on the sidebar menu

			2. In the member profile screen, scroll down until you see the option "Remove this family member".
My phone was stolen, how can I locate it?
You can check the last information about your mobile at our Web Panel (http://panel.zoemob.com).
If you could not solve your doubt so far, talk to us using our support channel.
